no_favorites.title: Nothing here yet :(
no_favorites.subtitle: Add some favorites on the search page to see them here

local_list.title: My Saved Resources
local_list.description: Resources you save here are stored in your browser. Sign in to keep them across devices.
local_list.empty_description: Click the heart icon on any resource to add it here. Your selections are saved in this browser.

purge_list.label: Clear all
purge_list.confirm_description: This will remove all resources from the list. The list itself will remain.
